Youth Development Recovery Grants

In May 2021 the Foundation awarded $5,000 grants to 67 of our youth-serving grantees to provide funding for anything that would help them adapt to the changing environment. Nonprofits have had to pivot their services and delivery models due to COVID-19, often expanding services to address the needs of entire families rather than just the youth they serve. This funding could be used for anything that helped organizations plan or provide services for their constituents as the sector works towards recovery from the continuing effects of the pandemic.
